What problem does this system solve?

- item 1
- item 2

This system is not responsible for:

- item 1
- item 2

## Outputs

## State

## Rules

## Tick/Update Behavior

Describe when and how this system updates.

## Dependencies

## Testing Plan

List possible future improvements.
